title: Terrible Mod 1
description: A bad mod, some would even say quite. terrible.
body:
Terrible Mod was created from June-August of 2022 and was my first experience making a Minecraft mod, as such, it is very scuffed and almost unplayable. I am more posting this for archival sake and if anyone just wants a good laugh. The revised version will be released along with Terrible Mod 2.

Now is time for the real shit.




~Features~

-44 Advancements

-29 Blocks

-10 Dimensions

-8 Paintings

-6 Music Discs

-5 Ranged Weapons

-5 Mobs

-4 Tools/Weapons

-4 Bosses

-2 Armor Sets

-A Plant

-A GUI

-oil


![All the items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba0a8dd588b508543415068a1f7aa00d384cc1ba.png)
